title: Duiker Launches AMMONEX Pilot in Rotterdam for Zero-Emission Hydrogen from Ammonia
content: Duiker Clean Technologies has selected the Port of Rotterdam as the site for its groundbreaking AMMONEX pilot, a project designed to convert ammonia into green hydrogen with zero CO2 emissions. Collaborating with Plant One, the pilot aims to solve the challenge of transporting sustainable energy by utilizing ammonia as an efficient carrier for long-distance logistics. Duikerâ€™s proprietary technology features precise heat regulation and high stability, ensuring a reliable and clean conversion process. With the Final Investment Decision (FID) secured in early 2025, the project is moving toward realization, with test results expected by 2027. Supported by funding from the European Unionâ€™s Just Transition Fund and Dutch subsidies (DEI+), the initiative strengthens Rotterdamâ€™s position as a hub for the energy transition and cleaner fuel imports.
author: Analysts Account
